# kSecAttrCanDerive

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a Boolean that indicates whether the cryptographic key can be used for derivation.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrCanDerive: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean] and indicates whether this cryptographic key can be used to derive another key.

On key creation, if not explicitly specified, this attribute defaults to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue].
title: kSecAttrCanDerive
